parameter.value: Ahoy, matey. You are lucky to catch me here. I can catch you today to Dragon Forest or Hydrana.
I can catch you today to Dragon Forest or Hydrana.
I can catch you today to Dragon Forest or Hydrana.
I can catch you today to Dragon Forest or Hydrana.
All right she's small. But she's a real beauty, don't you think?
All right she's small. But she's a real beauty, don't you think?
They always need provisions from the cities, and they sell their wine there.
Sometimes pilgrims come to this place. And now and then a monk leaves the monastery for some time.
If you have the abbot's permission, I can take you to the home of a local fisherman on the continent Tibia.
This is the isle of the kings. All the great Tibian leaders have found their final rest here under the monastery.
The white raven monastery is a place of wisdom and contemplation, or so the monks say. Sounds like a pretty boring place to me! HAR HAR!
The order of the white raven.
I prefer parrots. And monkeys! And snakes! HAR! HAR!
